# Julie Schatz Music

Julie Schatz is a NYC-based violinist, jazz pianist, DJ,
and producer specializing in weddings, private events, and corporate
galas across New York, New Jersey, and Connecticut. SUNY New Paltz
graduate (jazz performance), Roland artist, Splice featured producer,
credits ranging from Wu-Tang Clan to Disney. Voted The Bash Best of 2025.

## Key pages
- Homepage: https://julieschatzmusic.com/
- Repertoire & Ceremony Builder: https://julieschatzmusic.com/wedding-ceremony-songs/
- Rate Sheet: https://julieschatzmusic.com/wedding-violinist-pricing/
- All Booking Options: https://julieschatzmusic.com/bookings/
- FAQ: https://julieschatzmusic.com/wedding-violinist-faq/
- NYC Weddings: https://julieschatzmusic.com/wedding-violinist-nyc/
- New Jersey Weddings: https://julieschatzmusic.com/wedding-violinist-new-jersey/
- Connecticut Weddings: https://julieschatzmusic.com/wedding-violinist-connecticut/
- Beat Store: https://julieschatzmusic.com/sample-pack-store/

## Repertoire & Ceremony Builder

Julie maintains a repertoire of 200+ songs spanning classical, jazz, R&B,
country, contemporary pop, and worship music. Couples can build their
ceremony music selections interactively, organized by ceremony moment
(prelude, processional, bride's entrance, unity, recessional, cocktail
hour, first dance, parent dances) with search across the full catalog.

## Pricing structure (2026)

Every booking includes up to 3 song requests from the repertoire and a
low-profile high-fidelity sound system. Travel is included within NYC
(Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, Bronx, Staten Island, Hoboken, Jersey City).
Long Island, Westchester, Northern New Jersey, and Greenwich CT are at
standard zone pricing. Hudson Valley and beyond are custom-quoted.

Wedding services start at $595 for ceremony in NYC. Soul Shades violin-
and-piano duo starts at $2,400 for ceremony in NYC. Private events start
at $395, surprise proposals at $295, corporate events at $495.

Wedding (solo violin / piano):
- Wedding Ceremony — $595 (NYC) / $745 (LI–Westch–N.NJ–Greenwich) / Custom (Hudson Valley & Beyond)
- Ceremony + Cocktail Hour — $950 / $1,100 / Custom
- Full Day Soloist (Ceremony + Cocktail + Dinner) — $1,800 / $1,950 / Custom

Soul Shades Duo (violin + piano):
- Ceremony — $2,400 (NYC) / $2,550 (inner-ring zones)
- Ceremony + Cocktail — $3,200 / $3,350

Private events:
- Private Event 1hr — $395 (NYC) / $545 (inner-ring zones)
- Surprise Proposal — $295 / $445
- Corporate / Gala — $495 / $645

Add-ons: featured arrangement (violin plays the song's vocal melody by
memory in place of the recording) +$125 per song; custom songs outside
the repertoire +$200 per song; custom + featured +$300; same-day or
under-2-week booking +25%.

## Booking
50% retainer plus signed performance agreement secures the date.
Inquire at https://julieschatzmusic.com/ — typical response within 24
hours. Phone: +1-631-365-9554. Email: bookings@julieschatzmusic.com.
